name: cfn-guard-security-analyzer
description: CloudFormation Guard security analysis agents, packaged as Claude Code commands with bundled AWS Documentation and AWS IaC MCP servers.

plugins.name: cfn-guard-security-analyzer
plugins.description: Analyze the security of any AWS CloudFormation resource or service from Claude Code with no AWS account. The /cfn-analyze orchestrator lists a service's resources, produces a severity-ranked report, and generates self-validated cfn-guard rules — plus granular commands (security scan, property deep-dive, guard-rule generation, crawler). Bundles the AWS Documentation and AWS IaC MCP servers.
